  1. com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant
  2. TenantContextPropagator

Uses of Class
com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant.TenantContextPropagator

Packages that use TenantContextPropagator
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.

  • Uses of TenantContextPropagator in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return TenantContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TenantContextPropagator
    FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration.tenantContextPropagator()
    Registers TenantContextPropagator so that scatter/gather slice tasks dispatched to executor threads carry the correct tenant ID.
    Method parameters in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with type arguments of type TenantContextPropagator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ContextPropagator
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.contextPropagator(org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<TenantContextPropagator> tenantPropagatorProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<MicrometerContextPropagator> micrometerPropagatorProvider)
    Composes the active ContextPropagator from available propagator beans: TenantContextPropagator — present when failover.store.multitenant.enabled=true MicrometerContextPropagator — present when io.micrometer.tracing.Tracer is on classpath and a Tracer bean exists MdcContextPropagator — always included Declare your own ContextPropagator bean to replace this composition entirely.
